description: Go harder than everyone else in practice.

success.narrative: You were the best player on the practice field. Everyone noticed.

failure.narrative: You went too hard and tweaked something. Trainer is concerned.

description: Someone has been slacking. Call them out.
risk: Could rally the team or create a rift.

success.narrative: They took it well. The whole unit picked up their effort.

failure.narrative: It got heated. Now there is tension in the locker room.

text: Ask to try a new position
description: You think you could contribute more somewhere else.
risk: Bold move. Could open doors or close them.

success.narrative: Coach liked the initiative. You are getting reps at the new spot.

failure.narrative: Coach shut it down. 'Know your role.' Ouch.

description: Keep doing what you have been doing. Consistent effort.
risk: Safe. Won't wow anyone but won't hurt either.

success.narrative: Quiet week. Solid work. Coaches appreciate the reliability.

failure.narrative: Nothing went wrong, but nothing stood out either. Are you coasting?
